title: Add R1 Neo Renode model
description: Compose an R1 Neo model using nRF52840, SX1262, USB/BLE model components, and board-specific SPIM/GPIO/power-hold wiring with stable identity.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical R1 Neo gateway and puck firmware reach BLE/CoAP readiness and independently observed simulator TX; provisional reset, GNSS, bootloader, and power timing remain explicitly physical-validation items.
close_reason: Added R1 Neo Renode model (muzi/r1_neo) using SX1262.cs + GPIO1 wiring matching dts, BLE.cs updates, nRF USBD override in repl, startup repl. Updated tests, scripts. Renode sims pass.
